title: lucuma littoralis
intro: Lucuma littoralis is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the coastal regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lucuma littoralis include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Lucuma littoralis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
